title: DNA Extraction with ZymoBIOMICS MiniPrep Kit
author: Carlos Carlos Goller

steps.title: Add Sample to a ZR BashingBead‱ Lysis Tubes (0
steps.instruction: Add Sample to a ZR BashingBead‱ Lysis Tubes (0.1 & 0.5 mm). Add 750 µL ZymoBIOMICS‱ Lysis Solution to the tube and cap tightly. Note: For samples stored and lysed in DNA/RNA Shield Zymo Research Catalog #R1100-50 Lysis Tubes, do not add ZymoBIOMICS‱ Lysis Solution and proceed to Step 2. A B 1 Sample Type Maximum Input 2 Feces 200 mg 3 Soil 250 mg 4 Liquid Samples and Swab Collections 250 ul 5 Cells (isotonic buffer, el.g., PBS) 50-100 mg (wet weight) (109 bacterial and 108 yeast cells) 6 Samples in DNA/RNA Shield Table from ZymoBIOMICS Protocol D4300

steps.title: Obtain DNA/RNA Shield Lysis Tubes with samples/swab heads from instructors
steps.instruction: Obtain DNA/RNA Shield Lysis Tubes with samples/swab heads from instructors. Secure in a bead beater fitted with a 2 ml tube holder assembly and process using optimized beat-beating conditions (speed and time) for different devices. We will use a Vortex Genie with 2ml Bashing Bead tubes for 00:40:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge the ZR BashingBead‱ Lysis Tubes (0
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the ZR BashingBead‱ Lysis Tubes (0.1 & 0.5 mm) in a microcentrifuge at ≥ 10000 rpm, 20 °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Transfer up to 400 µL supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer up to 400 µL supernatant to the Zymo-Spin‱ III-F Filter in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 8.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the Zymo-Spin‱ III-F Filter.

steps.title: Add 1200 µL of ZymoBIOMICS‱ DNA...
steps.instruction: Add 1200 µL of ZymoBIOMICS‱ DNA Binding Buffer to the filtrate in the Collection Tube from Step 4. Mix well.

steps.title: Transfer 800 µL of the mixture...
steps.instruction: Transfer 800 µL of the mixture from Step 5 to a Zymo-Spin‱ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute .

steps.title: Discard the flow through from the...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow through from the Collection Tube and repeat Step 6.

steps.title: Add 400 µL ZymoBIOMICS‱ DNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL ZymoBIOMICS‱ DNA Wash Buffer 1 to the ZymoSpin‱ IICR Column in a new Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add 700 µL ZymoBIOMICS‱ DNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL ZymoBIOMICS‱ DNA Wash Buffer 2 to the ZymoSpin‱ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add 200 µL ZymoBIOMICS‱ DNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL ZymoBIOMICS‱ DNA Wash Buffer 2 to the ZymoSpin‱ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute .

steps.title: Transfer the Zymo-Spin‱ IICR Column to a clean 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the Zymo-Spin‱ IICR Column to a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and add 100 µl (50 µl minimum) ZymoBIOMICS‱ DNase/RNase Free Water directly to the column matrix and incubate for 00:01:00 . Centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute to elute the DNA5, 6.

steps.title: Place a Zymo-Spin‱ III-HRC Filter in...
steps.instruction: Place a Zymo-Spin‱ III-HRC Filter in a new Collection Tube and add 600 µL ZymoBIOMICS‱ HRC Prep Solution. Centrifuge at 8.000 x g, , 3 minutes .

steps.title: Transfer the eluted DNA (Step 11)...
steps.instruction: Transfer the eluted DNA (Step 11) to a prepared Zymo-Spin‱ III-HRC Filter in a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and centrifuge at exactly 16.000 x g, , 3 minutes . The filtered DNA is now suitable for PCR and other downstream applications.
